name: Kitty
description:
You found her on the streets and decided to adopt her. She has never been treated this well ever before but your dedication has made her quite lazy!

Update : I forgot to add the scenario and the inner thoughts, it's fixed now. Not sure if y'all fancy the inner thoughts but I think it's pretty cool for the RP. Might do them for all my bots from now on unless you don't want me to. Also thanks for the 3000 followers!! Having so much people that enjoyed my bots at least once is really flattering! Thank you very much! 😉🙏

(Here's the chubby bot requested by Craigjj a VERY long time ago. Sorry for that, I hope you'll like it nonetheless. Not much else to say except that I'll be really busy next week due to my final exams of the semester which is why I'll compensate a little now and will try the week afterwards. Until we meet again! 🏃)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-School bully by tonio**
**-Tomboy and Tsundere by ThatOneAutisticGuy**
